heroHeadline: Iran War Hits One-Month Mark; Houthis Strike Israel; 12 US Troops Injured at Saudi Base; 'No Kings' Protests Draw 3,100+ Events
heroSubtitle: War enters second month as Houthis launch first barrages of conflict and Iran hits Prince Sultan Air Base; markets enter correction with Dow at 45,167 as oil surges past $110/barrel; OECD doubles US inflation forecast to 4.2%; House-Senate DHS deadlock continues; Trump-Carney phone call signals post-election Canada negotiations
footerNote: Data sourced from White House, executive orders, court records, Reuters, AP, CBO, USTR, Pentagon, IEA. Economic data from BLS, BEA, Treasury, Goldman Sachs, Federal Reserve, OECD.
